content.problemStatement:
Lets Implement the matrix.

Task
Choose whatever programming language you're comfortable in, and declare a 2D array for a square matrix.
Store all the integers from 1 to N2N^{\text{2}}N2 in it.
Print all the the integers from left to right going down in the matrix.

Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer NNN, denoting the no. of rows and columns in square matrix.


Output Format

Output on a single line, N2N^{\text{2}}N2 space separated integers from 1 to NthN^{\text{th}}Nth, the elements of the matrix.
content.inputFormat: First line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Each test case consists of a single line containing an integer N (1 ≤ N ≤ 100).
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print N² space‑separated integers from 1 to N² in row‑major order (left to right, top to bottom) on its own line.

sampleTestCases.explanation: There is a single test case with N=3. The 3×3 matrix filled row‑wise contains numbers 1 through 9, which are printed on one line.
First test case N=2 produces 1 2 3 4. Second test case N=1 produces just 1. Each test case output is on its own line.
N=5 creates a 5×5 matrix; numbers 1 through 25 are printed in row‑major order.

solution.approach: The matrix is filled with consecutive integers starting from 1. Since the required output is just the numbers in row‑major order, we can generate the sequence 1,2,…,N² for each test case and print it directly. This runs in O(N²) time per test case and O(1) extra space.
solution.timeComplexity: O(N²) per test case, O(total N²) over all test cases

code.C:
#include <stdio.h>
int main(){int T; if(scanf("%d",&T)!=1) return 0; while(T--){int n; scanf("%d",&n); int total=n*n; for(int i=1;i<=total;++i){printf("%d",i); if(i!=total) printf(" ");} if(T) printf("\n");} return 0;}
code.Java:
import java.io.*;
public class Main{public static void main(String[] args)throws Exception{BufferedReader br=new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(System.in));int T=Integer.parseInt(br.readLine().trim());StringBuilder sb=new StringBuilder();for(int tc=0;tc<T;tc++){int n=Integer.parseInt(br.readLine().trim());int total=n*n;for(int i=1;i<=total;i++){sb.append(i);if(i!=total) sb.append(' ');}if(tc!=T-1) sb.append('\n');}System.out.print(sb.toString());}}
code.Python3:
import sys
data=sys.stdin.read().strip().split()
if not data:
    sys.exit()
T=int(data[0])
idx=1
out=[]
for _ in range(T):
    n=int(data[idx]);idx+=1
    total=n*n
    out.append(' '.join(str(i) for i in range(1,total+1)))
print('\n'.join(out))
